mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0403-01#Sql001 */ FUNC_ID AS FUNCTION_ID, CAT_ID AS T9N_INFO_CAT, FILE_DIR AS FILE_DIRECTORY FROM CORDYS.TB_MED_TEMP_FILE_DIR
FUNC_ID = 'M3' AND CAT_ID = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0403-01#Sql004 */ COR_USER_ATTRBUTE_INFO SET COR_TRANSFER_CODE = #{req.storageSendingMedium}, COR_DEPOSIT = #{req.depositDestinations}, COR_DONATION = #{req.destination}, COR_DEPOSITORY = #{req.storageSpace}, COR_DEPOSITORY_TERM = #{req.preservePeriod}, COR_DIPOSAL_METHOD = #{req.disposeMethod}, COR_DIPOSAL_FLG = #{req.notDispose}, COR_DIPOSAL_DATE = #{req.disposeDateYmd}, COR_DEPOSIT_OUTLINE = #{req.corDepositOutline}, COR_DONATION_OUTLINE = #{req.corDonationOutline}, COR_DEPOSITORY_OUTLINE = #{req.corDepositoryOutline}, COR_UPDATE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, COR_UPDATE_BY = #{req.loginId} WHERE COR_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.personalInfoManageId})
